holdings.infoBox: NBJP is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tokyo Electron stock at 4.48%, Sumitomo Electric Industries at 4.25%, Tokio Marine Holdings at 4.17%, Mizuho Financial Group at 4.15%, and Ibiden at 3.62%.

overview.description: The Neuberger Japan Equity ETF (NBJP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, primarily investing in equity securities of companies economically tied to Japan across all capitalizations and sectors. The fund targets firms it deems to be high-quality, with significant growth potential, aiming for long-term capital appreciation NBJP was launched on Sep 11, 2024 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.
